systemStatus.headline: Tue May 19 7 AM run — all four primary sources refreshed: Toast Mon May 18 DPS arrived, Sling Tue May 19 schedule arrived (8 employees, 37.66 hrs), Google Ads live scrape OK, Yelp Ads live scrape OK. No TripAdvisor email.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: Mon May 18 Group DPS arrived at 6:15 AM PT — Net $2,034.50, Gross $2,107.50, 81 guests, 62 orders, labor 19.3%. Note: arrived as Group format, not 229 W Montecito-specific DPS; values match single-location since group has one location. (2) Sling: Tue May 19 daily report arrived 7:01 AM PT — 8 employees scheduled, 37.66 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 1 off. (3) Google Ads: live scrape from ads.google.com/aw/overview — yesterday cost $25.99, 119 clicks, 5.47K impressions, CTR 2.18%, CPC $0.22. Cost up +42.11% vs last Monday. Balance $423.15, next payment Jun 1. Reservation conversion tag still unverified. (4) Yelp Ads: live scrape from biz.yelp.com/ads — last 30d 55.4K ad impressions, 684 ad clicks, 177 leads from ads (80%). Billing period May 1-18 spend $517.07, CPC $1.16, CPL $4.10. (5) TripAdvisor: no analytics email in last 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

toast.source: Toast Group DPS email arrived May 19 6:15 AM PT (subject 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Monday, May 18'). Full 229 W Montecito DPS not separately delivered today; group totals shown below reflect the single location (only 229 W Montecito is in the group).
toast.note: Mon May 18 was a soft day: $2,034.50 net on 81 guests / 62 orders. Labor pct 19.3% (higher than weekend 16.1%). All sales recorded as 'Order Type: Dine-In Orders 0 / $0' rows in the Group-format email — this is a Group-level rollup quirk; the actual revenue total ($2,034.50 net) is reported correctly above.
